evidence.finding: The Apache-2.0 repository contains the dataset generator and configurations that acquire LibriVox recordings and per-work text; its license is not by itself an artifact-level audio or transcript grant.
The publisher provides multi-speaker full and clean 44.1 kHz archives but the reviewed page does not state an explicit license for the downloadable dataset artifacts.

blockers: Obtain an explicit artifact-level license or permission statement for selected HUI audio archives.
Review the exact LibriVox recording and text-source rights for each selected work.
Select independent works and speakers that do not overlap the MLS/LibriSpeech development source groups.
notes: Do not download the published archives while this review is blocked.
A later accepted review must identify one exact work/speaker source group and pin its original artifact digest.
